summary: Executed backend pytest regression (6 tests) and frontend Playwright integration checks for landing/auth/dashboard/booking/payment/receipt/bookings/profile/CSRF flows. Core workflows pass, with one frontend critical asset issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Font Awesome CSS is blocked on all pages due to SRI integrity mismatch in base template link tag, causing icon rendering regressions.

action_items: Fix Font Awesome SRI hash (or remove integrity/crossorigin pair if not needed) in /app/backend/templates/base.html so icons load in production browsers.
After SRI fix, re-run a quick visual smoke test on landing/dashboard/profile to confirm icon recovery.
critical_code_review_comments: Hardcoded external asset integrity hash currently does not match downloaded file; this silently breaks UI icons across all routes.
Auth and CSRF cookies are set with secure=False; acceptable for local HTTP but should be environment-gated to secure=True on HTTPS deployments.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test users/bookings/vehicles via API and UI flows; one API test user cleanup attempted through delete-account fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated route conflict fixes: /api/slots/live-counts and /api/profile vs /api/profile-api are working. Booking -> payment -> receipt -> cancel flow is functional. Websocket/live update consumption observed via KPI value change over time on dashboard.
rca of the issue: Root cause of frontend issue: stale/incorrect SHA-512 integrity value for Font Awesome CDN URL in base.html. Browser blocks stylesheet due failed SRI check; icons fail to load globally. Repro: open any page and inspect console for 'Failed to find a valid digest in the integrity attribute'. Mitigation: update integrity to current CDN hash or self-host/remove SRI pair.
